mapper.select:
SELECT u.id AS userId, u.account, u.nickname, COALESCE(u.avatar, '') AS avatar, u.phone, u.gender, CASE u.status WHEN 1 THEN 'NORMAL' ELSE 'BANNED' END AS status, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = u.id AND deleted = 0) AS postCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE user_id = u.id) AS followCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follow_user_id = u.id) AS fansCount, u.register_time AS registerTime, u.last_login_time AS lastLoginTime, CASE WHEN u.interest_tags IS NULL OR u.interest_tags = '' THEN '' ELSE u.interest_tags END AS interests FROM `user` u
u.deleted = 0 AND u.cancel_status = 0
AND u.status = #{status}
AND (u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY u.register_time DESC
